title: Enchanted Meat
description: Adds beef and porkchop with effects!
body:
As Minecraft players we usually eat a lot of meat, wouldn't it be amazing to have meats with effects? Now with this mod is possible, you can craft speacial meat with effects.
  • Coal Steak & Porkchop
  • Copper Steak & Porkchop
  • Emerald Steak & Porkchop
  • Lapis Steak & Porkchop
  • Obsidian Steak & Porkchop
  • Diamond Steak & Porkchop
  • Netherite Steak & Porkchop
  • Iron Steak & Porkchop
  • Golden Steak & Porkchop
Eat all of them to discover their fun and useful effects!
